title: GlassWorm attack installs fake browser extension for surveillance

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - GlassWorm attack installs fake browser extension for surveil
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX

    category: firewall
detection:

        dst_ip:

level: high

snort: alert ip any any -> 45.32.150.251 any (msg:"CDB APEX GlassWorm_attack_installs_fake"; sid:2420364; rev:1;)
